testcase.name: Create a pet, update status, and verify via GET
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: Search pets by status
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Search pets by status &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet.feature:13&amp#27;[39m PET FIND BY STATUS - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK PET FIND BY STATUS - Count: 346 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI search pets by status &amp#27;[1m"available"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.PetSteps.i_search_pets_by_status(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mall returned pets should have status &amp#27;[1m"available"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.PetSteps.all_returned_pets_should_have_status(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Create pet with invalid status
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Create pet with invalid status &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet_negative.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have invalid pet payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.invalidPetPayload()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to create pet&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.createPet()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpet negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.pet_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Create pet with missing mandatory field #1
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Create pet with missing mandatory field &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet_negative.feature:16&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have base pet payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.i_have_base_pet_payload()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI remove pet field &amp#27;[1m"name"&amp#27;[22m from payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.i_remove_field_from_payload(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to create pet&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.createPet()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpet negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.pet_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Create pet with missing mandatory field #2
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Create pet with missing mandatory field &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet_negative.feature:17&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have base pet payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.i_have_base_pet_payload()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI remove pet field &amp#27;[1m"name"&amp#27;[22m from payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.i_remove_field_from_payload(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to create pet&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.createPet()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpet negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.pet_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Get pet with non-existing id
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Get pet with non-existing id &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet_negative.feature:19&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send GET request with invalid pet id&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.getInvalidPet()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpet negative response status should be &amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.pet_negative_response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Update pet with invalid id
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Update pet with invalid id &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet_negative.feature:23&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have valid pet payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.i_have_valid_pet_payload()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send PUT request with invalid id&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.updateInvalidPet()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpet negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.pet_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Update pet with malformed JSON body
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Update pet with malformed JSON body &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet_negative.feature:28&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send PUT request with malformed JSON body&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.putMalformedJson()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpet negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativePetSteps.pet_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Place a order for a existing pet snd verify
testcase.classname: In this we will covering Store API automation
testcase.system-out:
@store &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Place a order for a existing pet snd verify &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/store.feature:4&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have a valid order payload for the captured petID with quantity &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m,status &amp#27;[1m"placed"&amp#27;[22m and completed &amp#27;[1m"true"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.I_have_a_valid_payload_for_the_capture_petID(int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m PET CREATE - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK PET CREATE - Body: { "id": 1774866550445, "petId": 1774866550445, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:10.446+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send post request to place a order for pet&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.I_send_post_request_to_place_a_order_for_pet()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22morder response status should be &amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.order_response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send get request to get the order&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.I_send_get_request_to_get_the_order()&amp#27;[39m HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 10:29:13 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "id": 1774866550445, "petId": 1774866550445, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:10.446+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } { "id": 1774866550445, "petId": 1774866550445, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:10.446+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } store inventor get request body{ "id": 1774866550445, "petId": 1774866550445, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:10.446+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mprint response and validate the status&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.print_response_and_validate_the_status()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Verify the store inventory request
testcase.classname: In this we will covering Store API automation

testcase.name: Place order with invalid petId returns client error #1
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Place order with invalid petId returns client error &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/store_negative.feature:11&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have a store order payload for petId &amp#27;[1m-1&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m, status &amp#27;[1m"placed"&amp#27;[22m and complete &amp#27;[1mtrue&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_order_payload_for_pet(long,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m STORE ORDER POST - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK STORE ORDER POST - Body: { "id": 1774866555072, "petId": -1, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:15.072+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to place store order&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.post_store_order()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mstore negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Place order with invalid petId returns client error #2
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Place order with invalid petId returns client error &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/store_negative.feature:12&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have a store order payload for petId &amp#27;[1m999999999999&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m, status &amp#27;[1m"placed"&amp#27;[22m and complete &amp#27;[1mtrue&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_order_payload_for_pet(long,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m STORE ORDER POST - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK STORE ORDER POST - Body: { "id": 1774866556650, "petId": 999999999999, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:16.650+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to place store order&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.post_store_order()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mstore negative response status should be 400 or 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_negative_response_status_should_be_400_or_200()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Get order with non-existing id returns not found
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Get order with non-existing id returns not found &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/store_negative.feature:15&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have a non-existing store orderId&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.i_have_a_non_existing_store_order_id()&amp#27;[39m STORE ORDER GET - Status: HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found STORE ORDER GET - Body: { "code": 1, "type": "error", "message": "Order not found" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send GET request to get store order by id&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.get_store_order_by_id()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mstore negative response status should be &amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_negative_response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mstore error message should contain &amp#27;[1m"Order not found"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_error_message_should_contain(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Deleting an order twice returns 404 on second attempt
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Deleting an order twice returns 404 on second attempt &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/store_negative.feature:22&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have a store order payload for petId &amp#27;[1m123456&amp#27;[22m with quantity &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m, status &amp#27;[1m"placed"&amp#27;[22m and complete &amp#27;[1mtrue&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_order_payload_for_pet(long,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m STORE ORDER POST - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK STORE ORDER POST - Body: { "id": 1774866559879, "petId": 123456, "quantity": 1, "shipDate": "2026-03-30T10:29:19.879+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to place store order&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.post_store_order()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mstore response status should be &amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m Captured orderId: 1774866559879 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mcreated order id should be captured&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.created_order_id_should_be_captured()&amp#27;[39m STORE ORDER DELETE - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK STORE ORDER DELETE - Body: { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1774866559879" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send DELETE request to delete store order by id&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.delete_store_order_by_id()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mstore response status should be &amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m STORE ORDER DELETE - Status: HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found STORE ORDER DELETE - Body: { "code": 404, "type": "unknown", "message": "Order Not Found" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send DELETE request to delete store order by id again&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.delete_store_order_by_id_again()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mstore negative response status should be &amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_negative_response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mstore error message should contain &amp#27;[1m"Order not found"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.Store.store_error_message_should_contain(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Create user with valid data
testcase.system-out:
&amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Create user with valid data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user.feature:2&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have valid user payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.createUserPayload()&amp#27;[39m Status line: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Response body: { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1774866564693" }
&amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to create user&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.sendPostRequest()&amp#27;[39m Status code: 200 Body: { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1774866564693" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mresponse status should be 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.validateStatusCode()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mresponse content type should be JSON&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.validateContentType()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mresponse should contain success message&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.validateResponseBody()&amp#27;[39m username is testuser_1774866564693 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI login with the created username and password&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.loginWithCreatedUser()&amp#27;[39m Status code: 200 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mlogin should be successful with status 200&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.loginStatusOk()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mlogin response message should contain &amp#27;[1m"logged in user session"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.loginMessageContains(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m {"id":1774866564693,"username":"testuser_1774866564693","firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","email":"john@test.com","password":"12345","phone":"9999999999","userStatus":1} &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI get user by the created username&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.getUserByCreatedUsername()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22muser response should contain fields id, username, email, userStatus&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.userResponseHasFields()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser response fields should match the created payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.UserSteps.userResponseMatchesPayload()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Create user with missing mandatory field username
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Create user with missing mandatory field username &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user_negative.feature:13&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have base user payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_have_base_user_payload()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI remove field &amp#27;[1m"username"&amp#27;[22m from payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_remove_field_from_payload(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m NEGATIVE CREATE - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK NEGATIVE CREATE - Body: { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1774866569527" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to create user (negative)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_send_post_request_to_create_user_negative()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mnegative response status should be &amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Create user with missing mandatory field password
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Create user with missing mandatory field password &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user_negative.feature:14&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mI have base user payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_have_base_user_payload()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mI remove field &amp#27;[1m"password"&amp#27;[22m from payload&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_remove_field_from_payload(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m NEGATIVE CREATE - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK NEGATIVE CREATE - Body: { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1774866571108" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI send POST request to create user (negative)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_send_post_request_to_create_user_negative()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mnegative response status should be &amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Login with a non-existing user
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Login with a non-existing user &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user_negative.feature:17&amp#27;[39m NEGATIVE LOGIN - Username: nonexistent_1774866572728 NEGATIVE LOGIN - Status: HTTP/1.1 200 OK NEGATIVE LOGIN - Body: { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "logged in user session:1774866574078" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI login with a non-existing user&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_login_with_a_non_existing_user()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mnegative response status should be &amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22merror message should contain &amp#27;[1m"logged in user session"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.error_message_should_contain(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Get user with invalid username format
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Get user with invalid username format &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user_negative.feature:23&amp#27;[39m NEGATIVE GET - Username: Shree NEGATIVE GET - Status: HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found NEGATIVE GET - Body: { "code": 1, "type": "error", "message": "User not found" } &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mI get user by username &amp#27;[1m"Shree"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.i_get_user_by_username(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mnegative response status should be &amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.NegativeUserSteps.response_status_should_be(int)&amp#27;[39m
